purpose: PostToolUse hook on Write. Validates that progress files at dashboards/{id}/progress/*.json have the required fields (task_id, status, assigned_agent, stage) and a valid status value (in_progress|completed|failed). PostToolUse cannot block — issues `{message: ...}` warnings for missing fields or invalid status. Reads file from disk after the write so it sees the actual state. Companion to validate-progress-log-detail.sh which checks log quality.
gotchas: Field set is the bare minimum — full schema is much richer (see worker-protocol skill)
Status enum: in_progress|completed|failed — no other values accepted
